label: Flutter
description: Build natively compiled apps from one codebase.

phases.label: Flutter
phases.description: Build natively compiled apps from one codebase.

topics.label: Widgets
topics.description: StatelessWidget, StatefulWidget, Scaffold, AppBar, Column, Row, Container.

topics.label: State Management
topics.description: setState, Provider, Riverpod, or BLoC for managing app state.

topics.label: Layouts
topics.description: Flexible, Expanded, SizedBox, MediaQuery for responsive layouts.

topics.label: Lists
topics.description: ListView.builder, GridView, Slivers for efficient scrollable content.

topics.label: Networking
topics.description: http or dio package for API calls. FutureBuilder for async UI.

topics.label: Testing
topics.description: widget test, integration test, golden tests.
